/usr/bin/ar qc lib/libtakenc_core.a CMakeFiles/takenc_core.dir/src/core/tak_encoder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/takenc_core.dir/src/core/tak_encoder_wav.cpp.o CMakeFiles/takenc_core.dir/src/core/tak_encoder_filter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/takenc_core.dir/src/core/tak_encoder_subframe.cpp.o CMakeFiles/takenc_core.dir/src/core/tak_encoder_bitstream.cpp.o CMakeFiles/takenc_core.dir/src/core/tak_encoder_entropy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/takenc_core.dir/src/core/tak_encoder_decorrelate.cpp.o CMakeFiles/takenc_core.dir/src/core/tak_encoder_md5.cpp.o CMakeFiles/takenc_core.dir/src/core/ape_tag.cpp.o CMakeFiles/takenc_core.dir/src/core/tak_crc.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib lib/libtakenc_core.a
